heading: Periodic onsite reviews of institutional fiduciaries
label: 5508 Periodic onsite reviews of institutional fiduciaries
text: In addition to such other reviews of fiduciaries as the Secretary may otherwise conduct, the Secretary shall provide for the periodic onsite review of any person or agency located in the United States that receives the benefits payable under laws administered by the Secretary to another individual pursuant to the appointment of such person or agency as a fiduciary under in any case in which the fiduciary is serving in that capacity with respect to more than 20 beneficiaries and the total annual amount of such benefits exceeds $50,000, as adjusted pursuant to .section 5502(a)(1) of this titlesection 5312 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the seventh month beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2004 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2004section 507(a) of Pub. L. 108–454section 5312 of this title
